temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, tense scene, a man in a suit with glasses looks down at an old silver flip phone. He presses a button, and the phone's screen lights up with a green and blue color palette. The scene cuts to a close-up of another man's face, his eyes wide with shock and fear as he looks up, illuminated by a bright, cool light. (Storyline: This opening scene establishes a moment of high tension and mystery. The phone call serves as the catalyst, triggering a strong emotional reaction in the recipient and setting a suspenseful mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Urgent, panicked. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, electronic hum begins to build.)
(00:04-00:07) The man with glasses looks down at the flip phone, which is now ringing. He presses the end button, silencing the call. The scene cuts back to the other man, who maintains his shocked and fearful expression, his mouth slightly agape as he stares upwards. (Storyline: The act of ending the call, rather than answering it, deepens the mystery. The recipient's continued shock suggests the call was a warning or a threat, leaving the situation unresolved and escalating the tension.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense electronic hum continues, accompanied by the sound of the phone's ringtone.)
